suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Agent Card field reference from 'url' (top-level) to 'supportedInterfaces' array to match actual A2A spec structure used in implementation. Current text says 'url (service endpoint)' but implementation correctly uses supportedInterfaces[].url.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature a2a-agent-card-endpoint uses supportedInterfaces array with url, protocolBinding, protocolVersion per A2A spec. AGENTS.md says 'url' as a top-level field.
